arts.sum: But Emery's side have lost all three competitive away matches in November, having won five and drawn one of their opening six fixtures on the road this season. arts.sum: Aston Villa were held to a goalless draw by Juventus in the Champions League earlier this week. It was a frustrating result for Aston Villa, who have been on a poor run of form and came up against a Juve side which was quite depleted due to injuries. arts.ttl: PSG's secret weapon in transfer race to beat Man Utd to Chelsea star
arts.sum: According to TBR Football, PSG have ‘floated’ the idea to Chelsea that they would be willing to include Randal Kolo Muani in a deal for Nkunku, with the 25-year-old considered surplus to requirements. Paris Saint-Germain could line up a swap deal with Chelsea in order to beat Manchester United in the race to sign Christopher Nkunku in January.
